plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs to eliminate high risk.
Reduce exposure to concentrated tech and semiconductor sectors.
Increase allocation to income-generating assets like QQQI.
Trim broad index exposure to manage concentration.
Add a new, strong financial sector ETF (XLF) from scanner.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation with reduced leverage.
conservative.read: This plan aims for ~1.5% monthly growth with significantly lower risk. It focuses on capital preservation by cutting leverage and reducing concentration, holding a larger cash buffer.

plan: Trim leveraged ETFs to a minimal allocation.
Reduce exposure in semiconductors and trim broad index.
Increase allocation to quality tech (CRWD) and broad tech index (QQQ).
Add a new, high-scoring tech security (PANW) from scanner.
This balanced approach seeks growth while managing risk.
Maintains a moderate cash buffer for flexibility.
balanced.read: This plan targets approximately 2.5% monthly growth with a risk-first approach. It balances broad market exposure with quality tech and a small allocation to leverage, aiming for steady growth with controlled drawdowns.

plan: Increase allocation to leveraged ETFs like SOXL.
Add to semiconductor exposure and top-performing tech (CRWD).
Trim broad index (SPY) to fund concentrated bets.
Add new, high-scoring setups (TECS, PANW) from scanner.
This aggressive plan leverages strong conviction and high-scoring setups.
Expect higher potential gains and larger drawdowns due to leverage and concentration.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets ~4% monthly growth by leaning into leverage and high-conviction names. It accepts significantly higher potential drawdowns and the daily decay of leveraged ETFs. Strict stop discipline is crucial.

plan: Sell all high-beta and leveraged positions.
Eliminate exposure to volatile tech and semiconductor sectors.
Maximize allocation to income-focused ETF (QQQI).
Increase broad index exposure (SPY) for stability.
Add a financial sector ETF (XLF) for income potential.
This plan prioritizes steady income and capital preservation.
income.read: This plan targets ~1% monthly growth focused on reliable income distributions. It prioritizes low drawdown and consistent cash flow by rotating into income-generating ETFs and broad market stability, minimizing volatility and growth potential.
